overview.minides: The Ghost Series II — Rolls-Royce's most technologically advanced V12 — refined with a blockier facelift, a colour-matched digital cluster, and an 18-speaker 1,400W bespoke audio system.
overview.description: Launched in India in December 2024, the Rolls-Royce Ghost Series II is the mid-cycle facelift of the second-generation Ghost (RR12). It retains the hand-built 6.75L twin-turbocharged V12 driving all four wheels via a ZF 8-speed Satellite-Aided Transmission — which uses GPS to pre-select the optimal gear for upcoming bends. New for Series II: blockier Spectre-inspired front design, illuminated Pantheon grille, slimmer LED headlamps, Spectre-derived tail lamps, a glass dashboard panel with backlit Spirit of Ecstasy, colour-configurable digital instrument cluster, upgraded 18-speaker 1,400W unbranded audio system (up from 1,300W), improved rear connectivity with dual wireless streaming, and expanded SPIRIT bespoke material choices including Grey Stained Ash and Duality Twill (2.2 million stitches, 17.7 km thread). Available in 3 variants: Ghost Series II (standard wheelbase), Ghost Extended Series II (+170 mm wheelbase), and Ghost Black Badge Series II.

colors.name: Black Badge Dark Tones (Darkened Chrome + Gloss Black)

suspension.front: Double wishbone with Planar Suspension System (electronically controlled dual-valve shock absorbers)
suspension.rear: Five-link independent with high-volume air springs; Flagbearer road-scanning system
suspension.additionalTech: Planar Suspension + Flagbearer (front camera scans road, pre-conditions suspension); self-levelling air suspension

steering.column: All-wheel steering (rear-axle steering, up to 3° counter-phase)

sharedSpecs.platform: Rolls-Royce ASMA (Aluminium Space Frame Architecture) – RR12

v12-6_75L-twin-turbo-563hp.name: 6.75L Twin-Turbo V12 — Ghost / Ghost Extended (563 hp)

automatic.gearbox: ZF 8-Speed Satellite-Aided Automatic with GPS Gear Pre-Selection

v12-6_75L-twin-turbo-591hp-black-badge.name: 6.75L Twin-Turbo V12 — Black Badge (591 hp)
v12-6_75L-twin-turbo-591hp-black-badge.engineTuningNotes: Recalibrated ECU, increased boost pressure, revised torque delivery curve, sharper throttle response

automatic.gearbox: ZF 8-Speed Satellite-Aided Automatic (Black Badge: sharper shift map)
